query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `intel_analyses` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `institution` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `domain` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `aum` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `inputText` text,
  `result` text NOT NULL,
  `modules` text,
  `lens` text,
  `isInternal` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `intel_tracked` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `institution` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `domain` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `aum` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `lastAnalysis` text,
  `lastFetchedContent` text,
  `trackingSource` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'news_api',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `intel_history` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `trackedInstitutionId` int NOT NULL,
  `result` text NOT NULL,
  `diff` text,
  `fetchedContent` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `intel_briefs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `weekOf` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
